should_fire.prompt: Monitor my loading dock footage and alert me when trucks idle too long.
Build a system that detects intruders and does a report every morning.
Is it even feasible to detect smoldering pallets given my setup?
I want to replace an LLM call with something cheaper for frame analysis.
Analyze my footage over time and aggregate zone activity into weekly reporting.

should_not_fire.prompt: Count the boxes in this single frame.
Image-level classification: flag pass or fail per photo.
Deployment cost question only: what does managed hosting run per month?
Pipeline shape is already known and clearly feasible — just train the detector.
